description: The 'contact' navigation item in the header is a span element on the home page and does not route to /contact, unlike on other pages where it functions as a link.

issues.name: Contact navigation item is not a link on the home page
issues.description: Expected: The "contact" item in the header should be a link that routes to /contact on all pages, including the home page. Actual: On the home page (/), the "contact" item in the navigation header is a <span> element instead of a link, making it unclickable and preventing navigation to /contact. On other pages (blog, portfolio, videos), it is correctly implemented as a link.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://localhost:3002 (the home page) with a 375x812 viewport.
Attempt to click the "contact" item in the header.
Observe that it is a span element and does not trigger any navigation.
issues.expectedBehavior: The "contact" item in the header should be a link that routes to /contact on all pages, including the home page.
issues.actualBehavior: On the home page (/), the "contact" item in the navigation header is a <span> element instead of a link, making it unclickable and preventing navigation to /contact. On other pages (blog, portfolio, videos), it is correctly implemented as a link.
